function.name: is_palindrome_number
function.description: Check if a number is a palindrome.
function.long_description: Determines whether a number reads the same forwards and backwards (ignoring sign).
example_user_queries: Tell me if 45654 reads the same backward.
Is the number 1001 a numeric palindrome?
Determine whether 98789 is a palindrome number.
Find out if 4004 is a palindrome.
Test whether 76567 is the same in reverse.
